station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: A truly beautiful local haven offering a wonderful and restorative stay. The cuisine was a highlight—each dish was meticulously prepared, showcasing truly awesome flavors. I wholeheartedly recommend this destination, whether you're seeking a tranquil weekend escape, a memorable family get-together, or the perfect, picturesque setting for a wedding. Cruising the backwaters on a boat ride was an absolute delight and a truly wonderful, must-do experience. The staff deserve special mention; they were exceptionally attentive and incredibly cordial, anticipating our needs with genuine warmth.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text:
Every time air filling person shuts the machine and open the air panel and told machine not working. I have experienced more than 10 times.
I am in dlh building. I attached bill also for proof.
I requested management to please check and do something.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text:
Petrol pump is fine. The issue is with the air attendant. Scammers will tell you there is a puncture and themselves poke holes in tyres
Do not fill air at all cost here

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: Even though, I am frequent visitor to this area, but always avoid this specific pump because the staffs here are very lethargic. Customer does not get adequate attention. Bikers get priority over Cars. This is my experience of last 3 occasion.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: SCAMSTERS - AVOID FILLING AIR. The guys are downright scamsters. Routine stop, the machine displayed sufficient air. Suddenly the guy says air leakage is not stopping and tyre goes flat within minutes.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text:
I have juiced up sometimes from here but at an odd hour like after 11am it seemed  to be close.
This place looks like its abandoned for years and you will only find it working if the staffs are present  there. If not than its closed. Plus at night it is less to not illuminated. Staff have some beef with the other pump at opposite  side,
I think its H.P. petroleum maybe. One good thing is that they accept online payment via Gpay, phonePe, etc. In older days this place was good,
But currently the staff is not bothering about this pump. As the road where it is situated connects to the highway in some way which will help people to fill up there vehicles tank. Else they have to take U turn and go to the other pump at opposite  side

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: This is one of two CNG filling stations in Kharghar. During peak hours it's not a good idea to come here. However if you're off peak hours then you'll be in and out in no time. Pressure for CNG is usually close to 200. This is not a 24x7 CNG pump.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text: Efficient service helpful staff 24 hours service. Air is free. Nitrogen air is chargeable. Car wash available. Cng is popular with rickshaws . Petrol and diesel oil at reasonable rates

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, near Andheri Fire Brigade, Irla Signal, Bharucha Baug, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400058
text:
While filling CNG make sure you pay by Debit Card or Credit Card. The CNG section people would say "Machine Kharab Hogaya Hai" and would take 1-2 rs. Extra for themselves. For eg. You have to pay 323.32 they might ask for 325.

Go to Petrol section and swipe card there. Also write the exact amount.
